state_snapshot.overall_goal: Enhance the AliceViewer framework (v2.0.1) with refined CAD-style camera interaction, UI-based control panels, camera bookmarks, and origin-aware grid feedback.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - **File Structure:** Headers in `include/`, implementations in `src/`. NO local nesting in `AGENT_HEADER_GEN/`. - **Build System:** `cmake` is not in PATH; use Ninja at `C:\Users\shajay.b.ZAHA-HADID\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\Ninja-build.Ninja_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\ninja.exe`. - **Camera Mapping:** - Orbit: `ALT + LMB` drag. - Pan: `MMB` drag (reassigned from orbit; no shift modifier needed). - Zoom: `ALT + RMB Drag` (Y-delta) or `Scroll Wheel`. - **UI Parity:** Both framework internals and the `sketch.cpp` callbacks must respect `ImGui::GetIO().WantCaptureMouse`. - **Interaction Safety:** `mousePress` in `sketch.cpp` must ignore `LMB` if `ALT` is held to prevent adding points during orbit operations.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - **Framework Versioning:** `AliceViewer::init()` must emit ">>> AliceViewer Framework v2.0.1 Loaded <<<". - **Camera Bookmarks (Radians):** - Top: Pitch 1.57, Yaw 0.0. - Front: Pitch 0.0, Yaw 0.0. - Back: Pitch 0.0, Yaw 3.14159. - Left: Pitch 0.0, Yaw -1.5708. - Right: Pitch 0.0, Yaw 1.5708. - Perspective: Pitch 0.6, Yaw 0.8. - **Projection Math:** `screenToWorld` performs NDC unprojection via `invert(Projection * View)` and calculates a Ray-Plane intersection at the $Z=0$ plane. - **Visual Aids:** Grid axes at $X=0$ and $Y=0$ use a darker grey (`0.2f`) for origin identification; all other lines use `0.5f`. - **Matrix Inversion:** Implemented a manual $4 \times 4$ cofactor/determinant inversion in `src/AliceViewer.cpp` to avoid external dependencies.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `include/AliceViewer.h`: Added `fov` float and `ArcballCamera::setBookmark(const char*)` declaration. - `src/AliceViewer.cpp`: - Overwritten via `write_file` to resolve `replace` tool mismatches. - Implemented `setBookmark` and `drawGrid` axis-highlighting logic. - Added ImGui "Camera Controls" panel in `run()` showing real-time stats (LookAt, Yaw, Pitch, Distance) and dynamic `fov` slider. - Updated `screenToWorld` to use the dynamic `fov` member. - `src/sketch.cpp`: Updated `setup()` help text; added `GLFW_KEY_LEFT_ALT/RIGHT_ALT` guard to `mousePress()` to isolate point creation from camera movement. - `state_snapshots/snapshot_20260326_122310.xml`: Persisted state before bookmark implementation.
state_snapshot.file_system_state: - CWD: `C:\Users\shajay.b.ZAHA-HADID\source\repos\AliceViewer_Scaffold` - HEADERS: `include/AliceViewer.h` - SOURCES: `src/AliceViewer.cpp` (Updated), `src/sketch.cpp` (Updated), `src/main.cpp` - BUILD: `build/AliceViewer.exe` (Verified by Ninja build at 12:28 PM)
state_snapshot.recent_actions: - RE-MAP: Standardized camera controls (ALT+LMB Orbit, MMB Pan, ALT+RMB Zoom). - UI: Implemented "Camera Controls" ImGui panel with bookmarks and stats. - MATH: Switched hardcoded `0.8f` FoV to a dynamic member synchronized across UI and projection logic. - STYLE: Enhanced grid readability by darkening the origin axes. - EXEC: Successfully linked `AliceViewer.exe` using Ninja.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Re-map Camera Interaction (Alt+LMB, MMB, Alt+RMB). 2. [DONE] Implement Camera Bookmarks (Top, Front, Left, Right, Back, Perspective). 3. [DONE] Add real-time UI for Camera stats and dynamic FoV. 4. [DONE] Highlight Grid origin axes ($X=0, Y=0$). 5. [DONE] Prevent point creation in Sketch during Alt+LMB orbit. 6. [READY] Framework fully refined for CAD-style sketching and viewport management.
